name: nowsdk-pm
description: A ServiceNow Senior Architect for Claude Code. Run it on your idea to design a new app (whole-platform architecture & design / AFU, with each component's delivery channel: Fluent SDK offline / Now SDK with auth / on-platform), point it at an existing project's docs to align and support its evolution, or bootstrap an example project. Invoked bare it offers these as a menu — a description is optional. Requires the latest Now SDK; grounds every fact in the official Now SDK (now-sdk explain) and source-validated references. Delivers live (with auth) or fully offline as a no-auth Update Set XML.
